titles.text: 美少女戦士セーラームーン FighterS

descriptions.text: Sailor Moon Fighter S is an improvement hack of Bishoujo Senshi Sailor Moon Super S Zenin Sanka!! Shuyaku Soudatsusen released on the Super Famicom on March 29, 1996. The hack has been first released on May 05, 2019 and has been updated several multiples times since.
